code:
import io
import string

fn is_ws(_ b: Int) -> Bool
  b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
end

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end

  let n = string.len(line)
  mut best = ""
  mut best_len = 0
  mut current = ""
  mut current_len = 0
  mut i = 0
  while i <= n
    mut is_end = false
    if i == n
      is_end = true
    else
      let bopt = string.byte_at(line, i)
      let b = match bopt
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if is_ws(b)
        is_end = true
      else
        current = "#{current}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
        current_len = current_len + 1
      end
    end
    if is_end
      if current_len > best_len
        best = current
        best_len = current_len
      end
      current = ""
      current_len = 0
    end
    i = i + 1
  end

  println("longest=#{best}")
end
